title: genista depressa var. tetragona
intro: Genista depressa var. tetragona, also known as Dwarf Spiny Broom or Dwarf Broom, is a low-growing, shrubby plant species in the pea family, Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve gastrointestinal issues, and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Genista depressa var. tetragona has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and skin infections, due to its antibacterial and antifungal properties. This plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy in traditional medicine.
